prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约34285名→34723名→35719名→32762名→33523名，整体在3.2万–3.6万名区间波动；2025年基准位次约33523名，较2024年略有 后移；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021年11人、2022年11人、2023年9人、2024年4人、2025年4人，近年大幅缩减；2026年计划增至8人，较2025年扩招 100%，竞争显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名2025年第180名、2026年第177名，排名略有上升，学校层次稳定；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园管理争议（排球比赛干扰事件等），但抖音综合热度排名第18（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高；历史投档异常记录中未见该校明显断档信号；该校以体育学为特色核心学科，在体 育领域具有全国领先地位。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校物理类招生专业主要为数据科学与大数据技术、康复物理治疗、应用心理学、运动人体科学、智能体育工程、运动康复等；其中数据科学与大数据技术属计算机类，社会热度偏热推荐；心理学类热度分化观望；广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年（440 208人）增加约15792人（+3.6%），考生规模小幅扩大；北京体育大学位于北京市，属跨省招生；广东省考生对北京高校 有较强地域偏好，北京作为首都对考生吸引力较大，但该校体育类院校定位可能使部分非体育特长考生选择时有所犹豫。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类招生计划从4人扩至8人（+1 00%）、物理类考生小幅增加（+3.6%）、声誉偏负面但抖音高热、数据科学等专业热度偏热等因素，扩招是最大影响因素，预计录取门槛大幅降低，位次显著后移；预测最低位次 约53137名，区间52637–53637名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 34285 → 34723 → 35719 → 32762 → 33523, fluctuating within the range of 32,000 to 36,000; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 33523, slightly lower than 2024; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong was 11 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 4 in 2025, with a significant reduction in recent years; the plan for 2026 increases to 8, a 100% expansion compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking is 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026, showing a slight rise and stable school level; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus management controversies (such as the volleyball match interference incident), but its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 18th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and considerable application attention; no obvious gap signals have been observed in historical admission anomalies; the university's core discipline is sports science, holding a leading position nationwide in the sports field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category majors mainly include Data Science and Big Data Technology, Rehabilitation Physical Therapy, Applied Psychology, Sports Human Science, Intelligent Sports Engineering, and Sports Rehabilitation; among them, Data Science and Big Data Technology belongs to the computer category, with high social popularity and recommendation; psychology majors have divided popularity and are to be observed; the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of approximately 15,792 (+3.6%) compared to 2025 (440,208), with a slight expansion in examinee scale; Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment; Guangdong examinees have a strong regional preference for Beijing universities, as Beijing, as the capital, is highly attractive to examinees, but the university's sports-oriented positioning may cause some non-sports-specialized examinees to hesitate in their choice.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan from 4 to 8 (+100%), a slight increase in Physics Category examinees (+3.6%), a somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin popularity, and the high popularity of majors like Data Science, the expansion is the most significant factor, leading to a substantial decrease in admission thresholds and a significant backward shift in rankings; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 53137, with a range of 52637 to 53637.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 7440 → 7447 → 8957 → 7733 → 8476, showing a fluctuating trend, oscillating within the 7700–9000 range in recent 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 8476, slightly lower than 2024; the enrollment plan for this university in Guangdong Province for History Category was 9 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 5 in 2024, and 5 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction then stabilization; the 2026 plan remains 5, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026, with a slight rise, indicating stable university level; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 Gaokao cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving campus management controversies (such as volleyball match interference incidents), but its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 18th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, attracting considerable application attention; no obvious gap signals were seen in historical admission anomaly records; the university features sports science as its core discipline, holding a nationally leading position in the sports field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The History Category majors at this university mainly include Journalism, Network and New Media, English, Tourism Management, and Public Affairs Management; among them, the social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors shows a clear discouraging trend, English/Foreign Language majors have average popularity with a wait-and-see attitude, and Management majors show polarization; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong Province is about 326,200, an increase of about 34,000 (+11.6%) compared to 2025 (292,200), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment; Guangdong candidates have a strong regional preference for Beijing universities, as Beijing, as the capital, has considerable appeal, but the university's positioning as a sports institution may cause hesitation among some non-sports-specialized candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the unchanged enrollment plan for History Category, a significant increase in History Category examinees in Guangdong Province (+11.6%), a slightly negative reputation but high Douyin heat, and declining popularity of Journalism and Communication majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 8476, competition is expected to slightly intensify, with rankings moving slightly forward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8376, with a range of 7876–8876.
